title: ochrocodon pudicus
intro: Ochrocodon pudicus, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae and is native to Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. Ochrocodon pudicus is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
